title: The Broken Sber
description: The bank they built. The bank they hate.
body:
**Please note**: This mod is a joke. Please don't take it seriously.
##  About The Broken Sber
**The Broken Sber** is an addon for [**The Broken Script**](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script), inspired by jokes from the Russian **TBS community**. Although it all started as a joke, it has become a full mod that adds new mechanics and dimensions to the game.
### Mod content
- **Sber Bonus System**: A new system, **Sber Bonuses**, is added to the game. You must constantly hoard them, because every in-game morning, the entity **Null** will take a portion of your savings. If you don't have enough bonuses in your balance, **the game will be over**.
- **Reputation System**: The amount of bonuses you lose each morning depends on your reputation. Your reputation changes based on your actions in the world.
- **Circwit**: An entity that will always be watching you and your balance.
- Other stuff
  - New structure: **The Sber Building**
  - New items: **Sbersung** and **Sberfood**
## 
This mod is still in development. More content is planned for the future, but the release date of updates is currently unknown.
## Special Thanks
**JDG** - Cool icon

**daofi** - Idea👍

**Artis_juck** - Circwit creator

and **TBS Russian community**
## Русская версия
Отдельная русская версия мода есть на нашем [Дискорд](https://discord.gg/wVvwr28Rpw) сервере. (НЕ ИСПОЛЬЗУЙТЕ 2 ВЕРСИИ МОДА ВМЕСТЕ!)
